title: Pyrosalsa's Cobblemon
body:
# Pyrosalsa's Cobblemon modpack!

This is a lightweight modpack that adds to the base Cobblemon experience and includes quality of life and optimization enhancements.

> ### Cobblemon Addons
> This pack includes many addons to Cobblemon such as **Cobblemon Poképedia: Cobblepedia**, **Cobblemon Spawn Notification**, **Cobblemon Capture XP**, and **Cobbreeding**. Plenty of fun addons to make the experience more fun! 

> ### Optimization
> Everyone hates lagging and dropping frames, so we made sure to include the staple optimization mods such as **Sodium**, **Iris Shaders**, **Indium**, **Continuity**, and more. We want this pack to run as smoothly as possible.

> ### QOL
> As mentioned, we've added lots of fun QOL mods to make your time playing more enjoyable. To name a few, we have **Jade**, **JEI**, **Xaero's World Map and Minimap**, and **Trinkets**.


**There's a whole world full of pocket monsters for you to catch, so you'd better get started!**

<details>
